summary: Day 2-3 Hardening Testing Complete - All 31 tests passed (1 skipped). Verified atomic check-in/check-out transactions, tenant isolation, deep health check, and performance indexes.

minor.issue: Redis shows 'fail' status (expected in this environment - no Redis available)

critical_code_review_comments: All atomic check-in/check-out operations use MongoDB transactions with ReadConcern('snapshot') and WriteConcern('majority') for proper isolation
TenantScopedDB properly auto-injects tenant_id and blocks cross-tenant access
Performance indexes are created on startup for bookings, rooms, folios, guests, outbox_events, housekeeping_tasks
Deep health check endpoint returns mongo/redis/outbox/night_audit status
seed_data_creation: None - used existing rooms and guests from seed data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Day 2-3 hardening features fully tested. Key features verified: (1) Atomic check-in/check-out via POST /api/pms-core/check-in and /checkout - all operations (booking, room, folio, housekeeping, audit, outbox) in ONE MongoDB transaction. (2) TenantScopedDB auto-injects tenant_id and blocks cross-tenant queries/inserts/updates/deletes. (3) Walk-in creates booking atomically and immediately checks in. (4) Early check-in uses atomic transaction. (5) Group booking check-in-all and check-out-all loop through bookings with atomic operations. (6) Mobile staff quick check-in uses atomic check-in. (7) Housekeeping task deduplication - only one HK task per booking on checkout. (8) Deep health check at /health/deep returns mongo/redis/outbox/night_audit status. (9) Performance indexes created on startup. Note: /health/deep is only accessible internally (localhost:8001), not via external API URL.

atomic_checkin_api.description: Atomic check-in: booking→checked_in, room→occupied, folio created, audit log, outbox event

atomic_checkout_api.description: Atomic checkout: booking→checked_out, room→dirty, folio→closed, housekeeping task, audit log, outbox event

walk_in_atomic.description: Walk-in creates booking atomically and immediately checks in

early_checkin_atomic.description: Early check-in uses atomic check-in transaction

group_checkin_all.description: Group check-in loops through bookings with atomic operations

mobile_quick_checkin.description: Mobile staff quick check-in uses atomic check-in

housekeeping_deduplication.description: Only one HK task per booking on checkout

performance_indexes.description: Indexes created on startup for bookings, rooms, folios, guests, outbox_events, housekeeping_tasks

audit_trail_created.description: Audit trail entries created for check-in and check-out

outbox_events_created.description: Outbox events created for check-in (guest.checked_in.v1) and check-out (guest.checked_out.v1)

concurrent_checkin_safety.description: Two parallel check-ins on same booking: only one succeeds
